title: Coinbase Launches Tool That Lets AI Agents Trade Crypto and Make Payments for Users
summary: Coinbase has introduced a new product that enables AI agents to trade cryptocurrencies and make payments on behalf of users, with user-defined limits and parameters.
body:
Coinbase, one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges, has unveiled a new product that allows AI agents to execute crypto trades, payments, and portfolio management tasks. This feature is designed to give users more control over their digital assets by setting predefined limits and parameters for their AI agents.

According to the announcement, the AI agents can perform a variety of tasks, including buying and selling cryptocurrencies, making payments, and managing investment portfolios. Users can specify the maximum amount of money the AI can spend or invest, as well as the types of assets it can trade. This ensures that the AI operates within the user's comfort zone and financial strategy.

This development is significant for everyday users who may not have the time or expertise to manage their crypto investments actively. By delegating these tasks to AI agents, users can potentially optimize their portfolios and make more informed decisions. However, it also raises questions about security and the potential for errors or misuse.

For those interested in using this new tool, Coinbase has stated that it will be rolled out gradually, with more features and capabilities expected to be added in the future. Users should keep an eye on official announcements for updates and instructions on how to set up their AI agents.
twitterThread: Coinbase just launched a tool that lets AI agents trade crypto and make payments for you. Set your limits, and let the AI handle the rest. 🤖💰
The AI can buy/sell crypto, manage your portfolio, and make payments—all within the rules you set. Users control the max spend and asset types.

This could be a game-changer for hands-off investors. But be cautious: set clear limits and monitor activity. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-12-coinbase-launches-ai-powered-crypto-trading-and-payment-tool
standaloneTweet: Coinbase's new tool lets you set limits and let AI agents trade crypto and make payments for you. Perfect for busy investors! 🤖💰
